atoms.name: ISO27001 A.5.1 Information Security Policies
atoms.description: Requires management-approved information security policies that are published, communicated, and acknowledged by all relevant personnel. Policies must be reviewed at planned intervals or when significant changes occur.
atoms.requirement_text: Policies for information security shall be defined, approved by management, published, communicated to and acknowledged by relevant personnel.

atoms.name: ISO27001 A.5.15 Access Control
atoms.description: Rules governing physical and logical access to information and associated assets shall be established and implemented based on business and information security requirements.
atoms.requirement_text: Rules to control physical and logical access to information and other associated assets shall be established and implemented.

atoms.name: ISO27001 A.5.23 Information Security for Cloud Services
atoms.description: Processes for acquisition, use, management, and exit from cloud services shall be established in accordance with the organization's information security requirements.
atoms.requirement_text: Processes for acquisition, use, management and exit from cloud services shall be established.

atoms.name: ISO27001 A.8.12 Data Leakage Prevention
atoms.description: Data leakage prevention measures shall be applied to systems, networks, and any other devices that process, store, or transmit sensitive information to detect and prevent the unauthorized disclosure of information.
atoms.requirement_text: Data leakage prevention measures shall be applied to systems, networks and any other devices that process, store or transmit sensitive information.

atoms.name: ISO27001 A.8.2 Privileged Access Rights
atoms.description: Allocation and use of privileged access rights shall be restricted and managed through a formal authorization process, with regular review and revocation when no longer required.
atoms.requirement_text: The allocation and use of privileged access rights shall be restricted and managed.

atoms.name: ISO27001 A.8.24 Use of Cryptography
atoms.description: Rules for the effective use of cryptography, including cryptographic key management, shall be defined and implemented to protect information based on its classification and applicable legal, statutory, regulatory, and contractual requirements.
atoms.requirement_text: Rules for the effective use of cryptography, including cryptographic key management, shall be defined and implemented.

atoms.name: ISO27001 A.8.5 Secure Authentication
atoms.description: Secure authentication technologies and procedures shall be implemented based on information access restrictions and information security policy, considering factors such as password quality, multi-factor authentication, and session management.
atoms.requirement_text: Secure authentication technologies and procedures shall be implemented based on information access restrictions.

atoms.name: ISO27001 A.8.8 Management of Technical Vulnerabilities
atoms.description: Information about technical vulnerabilities of information systems in use shall be obtained in a timely fashion, the organization's exposure to such vulnerabilities evaluated, and appropriate measures taken to address the associated risk.
atoms.requirement_text: Information about technical vulnerabilities of information systems in use shall be obtained in a timely fashion.

atoms.name: Multi-Factor Authentication for Production Access
atoms.description: Requires multi-factor authentication (MFA) for all accounts with access to production systems, infrastructure, or sensitive data stores. MFA must combine at least two independent factors from the categories: knowledge (password/PIN), possession (TOTP/hardware key), and inherence (biometric).
atoms.requirement_text: All accounts with production access MUST use MFA

atoms.name: Access Control
atoms.description: The Access Control family covers authentication, authorization, and least-privilege enforcement across all systems and services. It spans identity verification, role-based and attribute-based access decisions, privileged access management, and session controls.

atoms.name: ISO27001 Organizational Controls
atoms.description: Controls relating to policies, roles, responsibilities, and processes (Annex A Clause 5). Covers information security policies, roles and responsibilities, threat intelligence, supplier relationships, and incident management. 37 controls.

atoms.name: ISO27001 People Controls
atoms.description: Controls for human resources security — screening, awareness training, disciplinary process, and remote working arrangements (Annex A Clause 6). 8 controls.

atoms.name: ISO27001 Physical Controls
atoms.description: Physical environment security — entry controls, clear desk and screen policies, equipment security, and physical media handling (Annex A Clause 7). 14 controls.

atoms.name: ISO27001 Technological Controls
atoms.description: Technology controls — access control, cryptography, network security, vulnerability management, logging and monitoring (Annex A Clause 8). 34 controls.

atoms.name: Access Review Log
atoms.description: Quarterly access rights review records demonstrating A.5.15 compliance. Documents all user accounts and privilege levels reviewed, decisions made (retain, modify, or revoke), reviewer identity, and completion date.

atoms.name: Audit Log Records
atoms.description: Tamper-evident logs capturing all access events, changes, and administrative actions

content.tamper_evidence: immutable storage or cryptographic hash chaining

atoms.name: Penetration Test Report
atoms.description: Regular penetration test reports demonstrating vulnerability assessment and remediation tracking. Reports must document scope, methodology, findings with severity ratings, and remediation status.
